channel.title: mchinenFeed
channel.description: subscribe for latets updates on posts.

item.title: ADB - pro utitlies and features
item.description: When talking to people about adb, most of them don't realise that it goes beyond the installing application via the terminal perk. ADB ( Android Debug Bridge ) provides state of the art features sets, i'll write about what commands i mostly use and why you should use them too.
